description_long: This object is a vintage-style corded telephone with a pixelated, blocky design reminiscent of early 20th-century models. The base is square and decorated with ornate patterns, featuring a large circular rotary dial on the front. A pair of rectangular earpieces are attached to a horizontal bar, which is supported by a central vertical stem rising from the base. A coiled cord extends from the left side of the handset to the back of the base, suggesting a wired connection. The handset rests on a cradle, and the overall color palette consists of shades of beige, brown, and tan. The phone's construction appears to be primarily wood or plastic with metallic accents, evoking a sense of nostalgia and classic urban decor.
description: A vintage, blocky corded telephone with a rotary dial, ornate base, and a coiled cord connecting the handset to the main unit. The design features beige and brown tones with a classic, decorative appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rotary dial, ornate base, and the full handset resting on the cradle with the coiled cord visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the base, the profile of the handset, and the cord extending from the back.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view showing the back of the base, the cord attachment, and the handset from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the side profile of the base and handset, with less detail of the rotary dial.
